description: '''Xavlegbmaofffassssitimiwoamndutroabcwapwaeiippohfffx''', often abbreviated as '''Xavleg''' ({{IPAc-en|ˈ|z|æ|v|.|l|ɛ|g}}, {{Respell|ZAV|lehg}}) and sometimes styled with capitalization of the final "x" in the name, is a South African [[death metal]] band known for their brutal style and comedic themes involving [[Internet meme]]s and [[graphic violence]].
